side_effects.description: Copper sting/burning sensation at injection site; moderate intensity described as 'burning impact'; varies by injection site location and batch

protocol_notes: User on second 50mg vial. First vial (from reseller website) produced no sting; second vial from same purchase produced copper stings starting day 1. By day 4 of second vial, rotating injection sites reduced sting severity. User notes lower abdomen (between beltline and belly button level) produces less burning than other sites. Mentions concern about vial quality/potency differences between batches.
